title: Shelton Theater, San Francisco, CA - Reviews, Ratings ... - Wanderlog
content: Reviewers praise the comedy performances, especially Cheaper Than Therapy, for providing a hilarious and charming experience. The theater's cool basement setup

title: Shelton Theater - 533 Sutter St, San Francisco, California - Yelp
content: Good customer service right there. The inside has different levels with cool historic vibes. There were also two bars. The lineup of the night was pretty great.

title: The Shelton Theater - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 ...
content: Reviews · Great little theater · amazing home for community theater and artists alike!! · Cancelled show without notifying us, so we wasted travel.

title: Shelton Theater | San Francisco CA - Facebook
content: Shelton Theater is blowing up once again. We are alive. Come roam the Shelton and drink and smoke to your hearts' delight. Experience a live human.
